channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Sam Neill, actor and star of Jurassic Park, passes away at 78
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- A versatile actor whose roles went far beyond Jurassic Park - Sam Neill dies aged 78
- 'Jurassic Park' star Sam Neill dies aged 78
- 'Hero, legend, sweetheart': Tributes to Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill, who has died aged 78
- Beyond Jurassic Park: The Extraordinary Career of Sam Neill
- Sam Neill, New Zealand Actor Known for ‘Jurassic Park,’ Dies at 78
- ‘Jurassic Park’ Star Sam Neill Dies at 78
- New Zealand actor Sam Neill, known for ‘Jurassic Park’ and ‘The Piano,’ dies at 78, his family says
- Sam Neill, Jurassic Park actor, dies 'unexpectedly' at 78
- Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill dies aged 78
- Sam Neill, known for roles in Jurassic Park and The Piano, dead at 78
- Sam Neill, Jurassic Park actor, dies 'unexpectedly' at 78]]>

item.title: Europe recorded 10,000 excess deaths during late-June heatwave: Data
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- May and June heatwaves killed about 2,700 people in England and Wales, data suggests
- Heat Waves in Europe Linked to Thousands of Excess Deaths
- 10,000 Excess Deaths During June European Heatwave, Official Data Show
- Heat Waves in Europe Linked to Thousands of Excess Deaths
- More than 2,700 deaths in UK linked to May, June heatwaves
- Over 2,700 may have died due to heatwaves in England: researchers
- Over 2,700 may have died due to England heatwaves: Researchers
- Europe recorded 10,000 excess deaths in late-June heatwave
- Europe recorded 10,000 deaths during late-June heatwave
- More than 2,700 deaths linked to UK heatwaves
- More than 2,700 died as result of heatwaves in England, researchers say
- Heatwaves may have led to over 2,700 deaths in England and Wales
- Heatwave claims over 10,000 lives in Europe]]>

item.title: UK bans support for two Iranian groups over antisemitic attacks in Britain
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- UK bans support for Iran’s IRGC and a linked group over antisemitic attacks in Britain
- UK pins string of antisemitic attacks on Iran-linked group, bans IRGC
- UK Outlaws Support for Iran’s IRGC
- UK Links Iran to Antisemitic Attacks and Calls IRGC Terrorist Group
- UK says an Iran-backed group was behind attacks on Jewish community, bans Revolutionary Guard
- UK effectively bans Iran's IRGC as national security threat
- UK Links Iran to Antisemitic Attacks and Calls IRGC Terrorist Group
- UK bans Iran Revolutionary Guards, blames IRGC-backed group for attacks on Jews
- UK says an Iran-backed group was behind attacks on Jewish community, bans Revolutionary Guard
- UK effectively bans Iran's IRGC as terrorist organisation
- UK proscribes Iran’s IRGC as a terrorist organisation
- U.K. says an Iran-backed group was behind attacks on Jewish community, bans Revolutionary Guard
- UK outlaws two Iranian groups over antisemitic attacks in Britain
- UK designates Iran’s IRGC as terrorist organization — Sky News
- UK outlaws two Iranian groups over antisemitic attacks in Britain
- UK says Iran-backed group Jewish community attacks, bans Revolutionary Guard]]>

item.title: 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Video shows huge fire at a Bangkok beer hall that killed 27
- Fire in Bangkok Bar Leaves at Least 27 Dead
- Fire breaks out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people
- Fire breaks out at a pub in Bangkok, killing at least 27 people
- Bangkok pub fire kills 27, wounds dozens: What we know
- Thailand probes Bangkok bar fire that killed 28 people
- Fire rips through Bangkok pub, killing at least 27 and injuring dozens
- Fire Breaks Out At Pub In Bangkok, Killing At Least 27 People
- Fire Tears Through Bangkok Bar, Kills at Least 27
- What to know about the Bangkok bar fire that killed 27
- Fire Tears Through Bangkok Bar, Kills at Least 27
- What to know about the Bangkok bar fire that killed 27
- Fire rips through Bangkok pub, killing at least 27 and injuring dozens
- Bangkok pub blaze kills 27: A look at the world's deadliest club fires
- People flee as flames erupt from Bangkok pub fire - video
- What to know about the Bangkok bar fire that killed 27
- 'We heard an explosion, then flames spread': Survivors recount Bangkok pub inferno that killed 27
- Bangkok pub fire kills at least 27, injures many others
- Bangkok pub fire kills 27
- At least 27 dead as fire engulfs popular Bangkok pub near Chatuchak market
- 27 killed, several injured in massive fire at pub in Thailand's Bangkok
- Bangkok pub fire kills at least 27 people]]>

item.title: Iran military warns US against Strait of Hormuz ‘interference’
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran warns it would not allow US to 'interfere' in Hormuz Strait
- Trump says US attacking Iran capabilities related to Strait of Hormuz
- Iran vows to block U.S. interference in Hormuz management as Trump says "reinstating" blockade
- Trump says US attacking Iran capabilities related to Strait of Hormuz
- Iran says won’t allow US to ‘interfere’ in Strait of Hormuz management
- Iran Rejects Trump's Bid to Police the Strait of Hormuz
- Iran says it will not let the US ‘interfere’ in managing Hormuz
- Urgent: Trump says U.S. would "guard" the Strait of Hormuz, threatens further strikes on Iran
- Rezaei describes Strait of Hormuz as a strategic deterrent, says Iran will protect it
- Why Iran insists on controlling the Strait of Hormuz
- Iran to oppose attempts to turn Hormuz Strait into security threat — MFA
- Iran to Open Hormuz Once US Stops Interfering in Strait Affairs – IRGC
- Iran warns that US interference in Hormuz Strait will affect global energy]]>

item.title: Trump says US will become ‘guardian’ of Strait of Hormuz and collect tolls
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump’s Threat to Impose Fees in the Strait of Hormuz Contradicts His Aides
- Trump’s Threat to Impose Fees in the Strait of Hormuz Contradicts His Aides
- Trump’s Threat to Impose Fees in the Strait of Hormuz Contradicts His Aides
- Trump demands shipping vessels pay 20% if they want to get through the Strait of Hormuz
- Trump Insists U.S. Should 'Run' the Strait of Hormuz and Get Paid For It
- US will charge 20% fee for ships using Strait of Hormuz, Trump says
- Trump reimposes US blockade and demands 20% Hormuz shipping fee
- UN shipping agency opposes fees for any strait, after Trump plans Hormuz charge
- UN shipping agency opposes fees for any strait, after Trump plans Hormuz charge
- Trump says US reinstating Hormuz blockade and charging ships for passage
- Trump says U.S. will blockade Iran in Strait of Hormuz and will charge ships for safe passage
- US will charge 20% fee for ships using Strait of Hormuz, Trump says
- Trump says US will 'probably run' the Strait of Hormuz
- Flash: Trump says U.S. to "guard" Strait of Hormuz and be paid for doing so
- Trump says US will control Strait of Hormuz, get paid for it
- Trump says the US should control the Strait of Hormuz and get paid for it
- Trump says the US should control the Strait of Hormuz and get paid for it
- Trump says the US should control the Strait of Hormuz and get paid for it]]>
